overview: Regen Med is a longevity and regenerative medicine clinic that blends regenerative therapies, advanced diagnostics, and lifestyle strategies to deliver personalized care. Led by stem cell medicine expert Dr. Tina Ipe, the clinic focuses on proactive health optimization beyond conventional medicine.
highlights: Regenerative therapies (stem cells, exosomes, PRP, PRF)
targetAudience: Individuals seeking proactive longevity and health optimization beyond conventional medicine.
